name: Black Ridge House
description: A bold contemporary home on the Maunu hillside in Whangarei. Strong geometric forms, a dark exterior palette, and an interior that balances drama with warmth — a home that earns its place in the landscape.

name: Tohunga Road
description: A heritage villa in Parnell required careful consideration of the existing facade and its character contribution to the streetscape. Working within heritage overlay constraints, we opened up the interior completely — wide oak floors, a new kitchen with vertical-board detailing, and a material palette that feels genuinely at home in the original bones of the house.

name: Matapouri House
description: A coastal retreat at Matapouri Beach, elevated to catch sweeping views of the Pacific. The home is arranged across a single level with generous glazing that dissolves the boundary between the interior and the sea.

name: Waipu House
description: A generous family home on a rural Waipu site. Passive solar orientation, sheltered outdoor living, and a material palette chosen to age gracefully in the Northland climate.

name: Grey Lynn House
description: A contemporary extension to a Grey Lynn home, opening up the rear of the house to create a connected kitchen and living space that flows directly to the garden. The new addition is confident in its own right while respecting what was already there.

name: Parahaki House
description: A hillside home in Parahaki designed to step with the topography and capture views across Whangarei. The design creates a series of connected living spaces that follow the sun throughout the day.

name: Glendowie House
description: A new family home on a corner site in Glendowie. The design maximises the aspect and makes a considered street presence, with a layout built around generous family living.

name: Tutukaka House
description: A coastal home at Tutukaka designed to make the most of one of Northland's most spectacular coastal settings. The architecture steps back from the land's edge, letting the landscape take centre stage.

name: Hillcrest House
description: A contemporary new home in Hillcrest, Whangarei. Clean lines, considered proportions and a design focused on making everyday living as enjoyable as possible.

name: Kiwitea Street
description: A renovation and extension in Sandringham that transforms a modest bungalow into a home that works for modern family life, while retaining the character that makes these homes worth keeping.

name: Piha House
description: A beach house at Piha designed to sit quietly in a landscape that doesn't need competing with. Robust materials, a sheltered outlook, and a layout that brings the outside in.

name: Mangawhai House
description: A new home in Mangawhai, one of Northland's most sought-after coastal towns. The design balances a relaxed holiday feel with the quality and durability expected of a permanent residence.

name: Parua Bay House
description: A new home at Parua Bay, nestled in one of Whangarei Harbour's most beautiful inlets. The design responds to the waterside setting with an outlook-focused layout and materials suited to a coastal environment.
